title: Regional Product Marketing Specialist (f/m/d)
required_skills: Regional marketing strategy development and execution
Competitor monitoring and market trend tracking
Demand generation and marketing qualified leads
Cross-functional collaboration (Sales, Distribution, PMM, Customer Service)
Competitive market positioning and pricing strategy
Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering or technical discipline
matched_skills: GTM strategy and regional marketing execution (EMEA, Asia)
Competitive analysis and market research (ECE Group, Leyard Europe)
Competitor monitoring — monthly intelligence reports (Leyard Europe)
Sales enablement and collateral development (20+ channel partners)
Product positioning and competitive market positioning
Microsoft Office Suite (inferred via MS Power BI certification)
missing_skills: Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering or technical discipline (Boru holds an MBA — no engineering degree)
Demand generation / marketing qualified leads (not explicitly demonstrated)
Technical marketing background in semiconductors or hardware domain
core_responsibilities: Develop and execute regional marketing strategies aligned with product and business objectives for European markets
Conduct market research and competitive analysis to identify growth opportunities and inform positioning
Drive demand generation campaigns and deliver marketing qualified leads to support sales
Develop and maintain marketing content for internal teams and customer engagement
Collaborate cross-functionally with Sales, Distribution, Product Marketing, Planning, and Customer Service teams
recommended_emphasis: Highlight EMEA-scope product marketing at Leyard Europe — directly mirrors regional marketing mandate
Emphasize competitive intelligence work (monthly reports at Leyard) to address competitor monitoring requirement
Lead with CRM tools (Salesforce, HubSpot) prominently in skills section
Reframe GTM strategy and demand generation framing from Futu Holdings to stress lead quality and pipeline contribution
Address engineering background gap proactively: stress technical product exposure (LED displays, B2B SaaS) and ability to communicate technical value to customers
Highlight German B2 and path to fluency given German language is a hard requirement
Surface cross-functional influence experience (HSBC PMO) to reinforce collaboration with multi-stakeholder teams
